texto: As a mother you have thoughts. You get interrupted. You forget.You are distracted. Your thoughts and ideas become fragmented,diluted, or simply evaporate. You must have faith that you willagain have a thought. Creativity is the string uponwhich you hang the pearls of your identity,your authentic presence.—Suzi Banks Baum
explicacao: Orientação direta de Suzi Banks Baum sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “As a mother you have thoughts. You get interrupted. You forget.You are distracted. Your thoughts …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, art, creativity-and-attitude, útil em momentos de creativity-and-attitude e motherhood.
